title: VP Harris and Trump running mate JD Vance speak by phone

title: Report says Biden to push major Supreme Court reform
shortDescription: The move marks a seismic shift for Biden, who has resisted a big overhaul of the Supreme Court. He is seeking to energize the left flank of his party.

title: No, these media executives didn't donate to Trump campaign | Fact check
shortDescription: Federal records disprove an online claim that top execs from outlets such as ABC, NBC and CBS donated to Trump's campaign.

title: US flag hung between cranes well above Trump rally stage | Fact check
shortDescription: Photos and a livestream from various news outlets show the flag could be seen only from certain distances and angles because of its position.

title: Trump receives roaring ovation at GOP convention
shortDescription: Donald Trump drew cheers during the first night of the Republican National Convention Monday, two days after a bullet grazed his right ear.

title: Republicans hope Trump shooting puts Biden campaign message off limits
shortDescription: Frustrated by being labeled the bad guys trying to steal democracy by Democrats, the GOP is grasping the possibly take away the Biden campaign's biggest message.

title: President Biden says 'bullseye' reference about Trump was a mistake
shortDescription: U.S. President Joe Biden told NBC's Lester Holt he made a mistake when he told supporters to put rival Donald Trump in a "bullseye."
